caption: The video depicts a scene set in a hospital environment, likely during a simulation exercise as indicated by the "Sim Week" logo. A person dressed in a hospital gown is seated and holding a baby wrapped in a blanket. Another individual, possibly a healthcare professional or instructor, is demonstrating how to use a medical device, such as a pulse oximeter. The instructor carefully places the device on the baby's foot while explaining the process, using hand gestures and verbal instructions. The setting suggests an educational context aimed at teaching proper medical procedures for newborn care. The text "Day 3" and a silhouette of a pregnant woman further imply that this is part of a series of training sessions focused on postpartum care.
